query: Framer 3.0 complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Feedback on Framer 3.0? - Reddit
results.content: # Feedback on Framer 3.0? Skip to main contentFeedback on Framer 3.0? Image 1 Go to framer. What are your thoughts on the features that’s added? What is unclear is that if this is 3000 (pro plan) + bought credits or in total. I’m afraid to try out the new features because if I’m addicted to it, it’s gonna be difficult to not buy additional credits and wait for the end of month for the limit to refresh. Image 3: Thumbnail image: Performance review season is here and everyone's staring at a blank doc. Also, most of the audience would love using it on Framer than on a CLI. I think it's a shame they don't have other packages for that money; if you want to use AI, you have to pay for it and you only get a few credits per month...

results.title: Copy / pasting broken - Framer Community
results.content: Massively frustrating when trying to copy and deploy from the development project to the live site. Testet on desktop app and in browsers.

results.title: Framer Help: How to report an issue
results.content: # How to report an issue. In this guide, we explain how to report issues or bugs and seek assistance for a smooth Framer experience. Fill out the form on our contact page. To receive assistance, fill out the form on our contact page and provide as much detail as possible for a faster resolution. ### Reporting a billing issue. When reporting a bug, fill out the form on our contact page and provide detailed information to help us address the issue faster. ###### How can I get support for a Framer product issue? Fill out the form on our contact page and provide detailed information to help us address the issue faster. Include the full error message (if applicable), screenshots of the error, console output from the Web Inspector, environment details (version, operating system, and browser), project and remix links, and the versioned URL of the published page for live site issues. ###### How do I report a billing or account issue with Framer?

results.title: Read Customer Service Reviews of www.framer.com - Trustpilot
results.content: Join the 110 people who've already reviewed Framer. Your experience can help others make better choices. | Read 81-100 Reviews out of 102.
